_comment: FX551 parity baseline for the 3 migrated BicameralRoute tool endpoints (bicameral-history/drift/ratify). PROVENANCE: the 'success'/'error' {status,body} shapes below were derived by reading the PRE-migration BicameralRoute.ts handler logic at git HEAD (commit 15af5a1, the B190 seal) and verified byte-for-byte against `git show HEAD:FailSafe/extension/src/roadmap/routes/BicameralRoute.ts` during the B151 implement cycle (2026-05-20). They are a record of pre-migration behaviour, NOT values computed from test input. 'clientReturn' is the value the bicameral client stub yields for the success case; the FX551 test feeds clientReturn (a structurally separate field) and asserts the migrated route, on the ALLOW governance path, reproduces the recorded 'success.body'. A future change to the route's response wrapper would diverge from these recorded shapes and fail the suite. Timestamp-bearing string fields are normalised to '<ts>' before comparison.

body.error: Error: bicameral tool bicameral.history reported isError=true
